title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, SBI Life Insurance in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!
